nasb.text: Zerubbabel was the father of Abihud, Abihud the father of Eliakim, and Eliakim the father of Azor.

esv.text: and Zerubbabel the father of Abiud, and Abiud the father of Eliakim, and Eliakim the father of Azor,

cnv.text: 所羅巴伯生亞比玉，亞比玉生以利亞敬，以利亞敬生亞所，

ccb.text: 所罗巴伯生亚比玉， 亚比玉生以利亚敬， 以利亚敬生亚所，

csbs.text: 所罗巴伯生亚比玉， 亚比玉生以利亚敬， 以利亚敬生亚所，
